steps.title: Contrast form and content
steps.content: The first sentence says Al-Haddad's poem looks traditional in form. The second sentence says that even within that traditional-looking work, she was doing something innovative.

steps.title: Use a concessive turn
steps.content: Choice A signals cause and effect. Choice B confirms or emphasizes, and Choice C simply adds more information. The sentence needs a word meaning “despite that” to show innovation beneath the traditional surface. The answer is D.
